title: Flows HD Lite
description: Welcome to Flows HD! We have worked hard to bring you a beautifully designed resource pack to enhance your Minecraft gaming experience.
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/WZQCGSN.png)

**Welcome to Flows HD! We have worked hard to bring you a beautifully designed resource pack to enhance your Minecraft gaming experience. We are modern, we are organic, we are elegant. With Flow's you will feel even more immersed in your Minecraft gaming experience. The world will look beautiful and feel beautiful. All we ask from you is that you enjoy every minute of your time spent using Flow's. Meanwhile we will be continuously innovating and developing our pack further so that you will never be out of date. We thank you for your support. Without you we wouldn't be Flow's and we love what we do!**


![Download](https://i.imgur.com/VbNTW0y.png)

**Flows HD Lite (this pack):** changes the Vanilla textures to HD textures to make Minecraft feel like a completely new game.

**[Flows HD Full](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/flows-hd-full):** adds modsupport, connected textures, 3d models, HD versions of Vanilla Tweaks and much more!


![History](https://i.imgur.com/Oee47Dc.png)

Flows HD was originally developed by [ArtFlo91](https://www.deviantart.com/artflo91/art/Flow-s-HD-Texturepack-128x128-210659002), based off of textures from the Misa texturepack. Since then it has received numerous updates from both [Eisregen](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/15-flows-hd-texture-pack-128x/) and [Lukolaz](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/flows-hd-revival--17-support-/). These three did some major work getting Flows HD to where it is now. Unfortunately, they are no longer in a position to update the pack any further. I've taken it on me to produce updates, for as long as I can. But don't be mistaken, it's the love from the community that has kept this pack going from Minecraft 1.2 and onwards. Great thanks to Keralis and the World of Keralis server, and specially to [Very_T](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/very_t/) and [TheGodCrafterUK](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/thegodcrafteruk/), who have developed the WOK version of Flows HD.

![Terms of use](https://i.imgur.com/RPRaASy.png)

**Allowed:**

- Private distribution and personal use of mix-packs are allowed.
- The original artist of any texture may re-use their own texture elsewhere.
- The use of the pack in minecraft videos, and live streams is allowed. Credits are not mandatory but are highly appreciated.

**Not allowed:**

- Public redistribution of Flow's HD is strictly prohibited.
- Customized packs which contain Flow's HD textures are not allowed to be distributed anywhere.
- Public redistribution of any ported versions of Flow's HD, like MCPE, is strictly prohibited.
- Public redistribution of Flow's HD from third party websites and platforms is strictly prohibited.
- Public mix-packs are strictly prohibited, unless permission is officially given.

![Donate](https://i.imgur.com/OzpDuhU.png)

Do you like our work? And do you want to help us create more awesome stuff? You would really help us out if you send us a donation.

[Donate](https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=XLDDEAKT2EWXJ)

![Contact](https://i.imgur.com/DpopBeD.png)

Do you have any questions, suggestions or ideas? Don't hesitate to leave a comment, we will most definitely reply to it. If you want to contact us without an account, you can send an email to: FlowsHDRevival@gmail.com.
